items.deck: With the K-pop group releasing its comeback album, “Arirang,” on Friday, look back at how one of pop’s original kings handled his time out of the spotlight.

items.title: Hindu priest who was kicked out of his temple at the age of 68 for being 'too old' wins age discrimination claim
items.deck: Deoraj Dwivedi had worked for 11 years at the Hindu Cultural Resource Centre Temple in Sandwell, West Mids, without a blemish before he was sacked, a tribunal heard.

items.title: Launch of map to report Asian hornet sightings
items.deck: People are being asked to report Asian hornet sightings as they are an invasive species on Jersey.

items.title: How the Iran war is impacting UK staycations: Prices to skyrocket to 'pandemic levels' - and demand for Lake District and Cotswolds higher than ever
items.deck: The Great British staycation boom is back as UK holiday companies report a surge in bookings since the conflict began, and interest in beloved spots across the country soars.

items.title: Life goes on as war rages around them: Iranians try to continue as normal as conflict spreads across region and sparks global economic chaos
items.deck: Images from cities in the country show people attempting to go about their business as usual, despite the constant threat of bombardment, as the conflict continues to spark global economic chaos.

items.title: What is the UK Covid inquiry and how does it work?
items.deck: The third report from the inquiry into the government's handling of the pandemic says the NHS was close to collapse.

items.title: US messageboard 4Chan mocks £520,000 fine for UK online safety breaches
items.deck: The fine includes £450,000 for lack of age checks to prevent children from seeing pornography.

items.title: Northern Lights Major Alert: Over 20 States May See Aurora On Thursday
items.deck: NOAA is forecasting a G1-class geomagnetic storm on Thursday, March 19, through Friday, March 20, with the aurora borealis possible from northern U.

items.title: As Pakistan and Afghanistan declare truce, civilians in Kabul count the cost of war
items.deck: At the Emergency Hospital, dozens crowded around a thick book to check the names of the victims killed in an airstrike on a rehabilitation center.

items.title: Uefa calls leagues to summit over 'microscopic' VAR
items.deck: Europe's top leagues are summoned to a meeting with Uefa to discuss how VAR technology is being used.

items.title: WATCH LIVE: Gabbard, Patel, and Ratcliffe return to the Hill for worldwide threat hearings Day 2
items.deck: Top administration officials are returning to Capitol Hill on Thursday for the second day of congressional oversight hearings.
